Title: Đăng ký thành công với email hợp lệ
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Confirm password: Test@1234 5. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Successful registration with message "Registration successful" and redirect to login page
Build_Version: Email verification may need additional testing

Title: Không đăng ký khi email sai định dạng
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: invalidemail 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Error message "Invalid email" displayed and user remains on registration page

Title: Không đăng ký khi mật khẩu dưới 8 ký tự
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Enter password: Test123 (7 chars) 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Error message "Password must be at least 8 characters" displayed

Title: Không đăng ký khi email đã tồn tại
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible. Email 'existing@gmail.com' already registered
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: existing@gmail.com 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Error message "Email already exists" displayed

Title: Không đăng ký khi email trống
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Leave email field empty 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Error message "Email is required" displayed

Title: Không đăng ký khi mật khẩu trống
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Leave password field empty 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Error message "Password is required" displayed

Title: Đăng ký với mật khẩu ký tự đặc biệt
Precondition: Browser opened and Registration page accessible
Steps: 1. Access registration page 2. Enter email: special@gmail.com 3. Enter password: P@ss!#2026 4. Click Register button
Expected_Result: Successful registration and password encrypted securely

Title: Đăng nhập thành công với email hợp lệ
Precondition: Browser opened. Login page accessible. Account test@gmail.com exist
Steps: 1. Access login page 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: Successful login with redirect to Dashboard and username displayed

Title: Đăng nhập thất bại khi sai mật khẩu
Precondition: Browser opened. Login page accessible. Account test@gmail.com exist
Steps: 1. Access login page 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Enter password: WrongPassword 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: Error message "Invalid email or password" and user remains on login page

Title: Đăng nhập thất bại khi email không tồn tại
Precondition: Browser opened. Login page accessible
Steps: 1. Access login page 2. Enter email: nonexistent@gmail.com 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: Error message "Invalid email or password" and user remains on login page

Title: Đánh giá khả năng chống SQL Injection
Precondition: Browser opened. Login page accessible
Steps: 1. Access login page 2. Enter email: ' OR '1'='1 3. Enter password: anything 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: Login failed. SQL injection blocked. No database errors in logs

Title: Không đăng nhập khi email trống
Precondition: Browser opened. Login page accessible
Steps: 1. Access login page 2. Leave email field empty 3. Enter password: Test@1234 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: Error message "Email is required" displayed

Title: Gửi email đặt lại mật khẩu
Precondition: Browser opened. Forgot password page accessible. Email test@gmail.com exists
Steps: 1. Click "Forgot Password" 2. Enter email: test@gmail.com 3. Click Send button
Expected_Result: Email sent successfully with reset password link

Title: Không gửi với email không hợp lệ
Precondition: Browser opened. Forgot password page accessible
Steps: 1. Click "Forgot Password" 2. Enter email: invalidemail 3. Click Send button
Expected_Result: Error message "Invalid email" displayed

Title: Session hết hạn sau 30 phút
Precondition: User logged in successfully. System time can be controlled for testing
Steps: 1. Login successfully 2. Wait/advance system time 31 minutes 3. Perform any action 4. Observe result
Expected_Result: Session expires. User redirected to login page. Message "Session expired" displayed

Title: Tìm kiếm hiển thị đúng kết quả
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Access product page 2. Enter keyword "iphone" in search box 3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Results display products containing "iphone" with correct count

Title: Tìm kiếm không trả về kết quả
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Access product page 2. Enter keyword "xyzabc123" 3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: No results displayed. Message "No products found" shown

Title: Tìm kiếm với ký tự đặc biệt
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Access product page 2. Enter special characters: @#$%^& 3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: No system error. Message "Invalid search" or no results displayed

Title: Tìm kiếm với tập dữ liệu lớn
Precondition: Database contains 10000+ products
Steps: 1. Access product page 2. Enter popular keyword "phone" 3. Measure response time
Expected_Result: Results displayed in < 3 seconds. Pagination shown for large result sets

Title: Lọc theo giá hoạt động đúng
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Click price filter 2. Set range 1000000-5000000 3. Click Apply
Expected_Result: Results display only products within price range

Title: Lọc theo danh mục hoạt động đúng
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Click category filter 2. Select "Electronics" 3. Click Apply
Expected_Result: Results display only products from Electronics category

Title: Lọc theo nhiều tiêu chí
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Set price filter: 1000000-5000000 2. Set category: Electronics 3. Set brand: Apple
Expected_Result: Results match all 3 filter criteria applied

Title: Lọc với giá trị không hợp lệ
Precondition: User logged in. On product page
Steps: 1. Try to enter negative price: -1000 2. Try price > 99999999 3. Click Apply
Expected_Result: Error shown or values auto-corrected. No invalid results displayed

Title: Hiển thị thông tin sản phẩm
Precondition: User logged in. On product list page
Steps: 1. Click on product "iPhone 15" 2. View detail page
Expected_Result: All product info displayed: name

Title: Hiển thị hình ảnh sản phẩm
Precondition: User logged in. On product detail page. Product has images
Steps: 1. View product images 2. Click on different images 3. Try zoom feature
Expected_Result: Images display correctly. Zoom and fullscreen features work

Title: Hiển thị trạng thái tồn kho
Precondition: Database has in-stock and out-of-stock products
Steps: 1. View in-stock product detail 2. View out-of-stock product detail
Expected_Result: In-stock: "In Stock" with qty shown. Out-of-stock: "Out of Stock" with "Notify" button

Title: Thêm sản phẩm vào giỏ thành công
Precondition: User logged in. On product detail page with in-stock product
Steps: 1. Click "Add to Cart" button 2. Verify cart updates
Expected_Result: Product added to cart. Cart count incremented. Confirmation message shown

Title: Không thêm sản phẩm hết hàng
Precondition: User logged in. On out-of-stock product page
Steps: 1. Attempt to click "Add to Cart" button
Expected_Result: Button disabled or error message "Out of Stock" shown. Product not added

Title: Không thêm số lượng âm
Precondition: User logged in. On product detail page
Steps: 1. Try to enter quantity: -5 2. Click "Add to Cart"
Expected_Result: Error: "Quantity must be > 0" or prevent negative input

Title: Cập nhật số lượng sản phẩm
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has products
Steps: 1. Open cart 2. Change quantity from 1 to 2 3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Quantity updated. Cart total recalculated correctly

Title: Cập nhật số lượng về 0 xoá sản phẩm
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has products
Steps: 1. Open cart 2. Change quantity to 0 3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Product removed from cart. Cart total updated

Title: Xoá sản phẩm khỏi giỏ thành công
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has products
Steps: 1. Open cart 2. Click Delete button on product
Expected_Result: Product deleted. Confirmation shown. Cart total updated

Title: Xoá tất cả sản phẩm khỏi giỏ
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has multiple products
Steps: 1. Delete each product one by one until empty
Expected_Result: All products deleted. Cart shows "Empty cart" message

Title: Giỏ hàng được lưu sau khi đăng xuất
Precondition: User logged in with products in cart
Steps: 1. Add 3 products to cart 2. Note cart contents 3. Logout 4. Login again 5. Check cart
Expected_Result: Cart still contains the 3 products after re-login

Title: Tính tổng giỏ hàng chính xác
Precondition: User logged in. Empty cart
Steps: 1. Add product A: 2M (qty 2) 2. Add product B: 1.5M (qty 1) 3. Check total
Expected_Result: Total = (2M x 2) + (1.5M x 1) = 5.5M. No rounding errors

Title: Thanh toán bắt buộc nhập địa chỉ
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has products
Steps: 1. Click Checkout 2. Skip address entry 3. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Error: "Address is required" displayed. Remain on checkout page

Title: Nhập địa chỉ giao hàng thành công
Precondition: User logged in. Cart has products
Steps: 1. Click Checkout 2. Enter address: "123 Nguyen Hue St" 3. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Address saved. Move to payment method selection

Title: Kiểm tra định dạng địa chỉ
Precondition: User on address entry page
Steps: 1. Enter invalid address format 2. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Validation error or auto-correction applied

Title: Chọn thanh toán COD
Precondition: User on payment method page
Steps: 1. Select "COD - Cash on Delivery" 2. Click Continue
Expected_Result: COD selected. Move to order confirmation page

Title: Chọn thanh toán Visa
Precondition: User on payment method page
Steps: 1. Select "Visa Card Payment" 2. Enter card: 4111111111111111 3. Enter CVV: 123 4. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Visa payment processed. Move to confirmation

Title: Đặt hàng thành công
Precondition: User on order confirmation page with all details filled
Steps: 1. Review order details 2. Click "Place Order"
Expected_Result: Order created successfully. Order ID generated. Confirmation email sent. Redirect to success page

Title: Đặt hàng thất bại khi thiếu thông tin
Precondition: User on checkout page
Steps: 1. Skip required fields 2. Click "Place Order"
Expected_Result: Error message shown about missing information. Order not created

Title: Xem lịch sử đơn hàng
Precondition: User logged in with existing orders
Steps: 1. Click user menu 2. Click "Order History" 3. View order list
Expected_Result: Order list displayed with Order ID

Title: Xem chi tiết đơn hàng
Precondition: User on order history page
Steps: 1. Click on an order 2. View order details
Expected_Result: Order details shown: products

Title: Áp dụng mã khuyến mãi
Precondition: User in cart with 5M total. Coupon SAVE10 valid
Steps: 1. Enter coupon code: SAVE10 2. Click Apply 3. View total
Expected_Result: Discount applied: 5M → 4.5M (10% off). Savings shown: 500K
